steps.title: Write both savings amounts
steps.content: After $x$ weeks, Barbara has her starting $70$ dollars plus $10$ dollars for each week, so her total is $70+10x$. Maria's total is $120+5x$.

steps.title: Set the amounts equal
steps.content: Their savings are equal when the two expressions represent the same dollar amount: $$70+10x=120+5x$$

steps.title: Find the number of weeks
steps.content: Subtract $5x$ from both sides and subtract $70$ from both sides: $$5x=50$$ $$x=10$$ The savings are equal after $10$ weeks. The answer is C.
